svg.title: Distributed web crawl platform architecture
svg.desc: Five-tier diagram: client/seed tier, message bus, worker pool, storage layer, and observability stack. Each component is clickable for detail.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should seed URLs be ingested into a distributed crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does sitemap discovery work at scale?')
sendPrompt('What is a recrawl scheduler in a web crawler?')
sendPrompt('How is crawl budget managed per domain?')
sendPrompt('Why use Kafka instead of an in-process queue for a web crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does the domain scheduler work in a distributed crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does async HTTP fetching work with proxy rotation and Playwright?')
sendPrompt('How should HTML parsing be structured in a high-throughput crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does semantic deduplication work using embeddings?')
sendPrompt('What does a storage writer worker do in a crawler pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Why migrate from SQLite to PostgreSQL for large-scale crawling?')
sendPrompt('What is a Redis-backed URL frontier in a crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does a vector database fit into a web crawling pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is object storage used for in a web crawling system?')
sendPrompt('How does Prometheus scrape metrics from a crawler?')
sendPrompt('What Grafana dashboards are useful for a web crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does distributed tracing work in a multi-worker crawler?')
sendPrompt('What should an alert rule for a crawler look like?')
sendPrompt('How does proxy rotation and fingerprint spoofing work in a crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does Playwright handle JavaScript-rendered pages in a crawler?')
sendPrompt('How does NLP enrichment fit into a web crawling pipeline?')
